overall.description: A driving sequence through a futuristic urban highway in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring a massive stadium structure and industrial buildings. The camera moves smoothly along an elevated multi-lane road with light traffic, passing billboards and under overpasses in a partly cloudy, cool-toned environment.

events.description: vehicle passes by in the opposite lane

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along elevated highway approaching the large stadium structure ahead

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving in the opposite direction

entered.detail: massive futuristic stadium structure with curved roof dominating the horizon
metal wire fence running along the left side of the highway
network of electrical wires and pylons crossing above the highway
metal guardrail along the left edge of the elevated road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated highway with a massive futuristic stadium visible in the distance. The camera moves forward along the multi-lane road, passing a wire fence and guardrail on the left, with light traffic visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved highway section around stadium with industrial buildings

events.description: road begins curving to the right around the stadium structure
yellow industrial building with NO ENTRY signage appears on the right

agents.ego_description: navigating the rightward curve around the stadium, maintaining speed along the elevated highway

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: tall yellow industrial structure with red NO ENTRY signage on the facade
concrete wall with large advertising posters beginning to appear on the left

segments.scene_description: The highway curves to the right around the massive stadium, which now dominates the left side of the frame. A distinctive yellow industrial building with warning signage appears on the right, while the camera follows the road's arc at steady speed.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway section with close advertising walls alongside stadium

events.description: passing close to billboard wall on left with large face advertisements
approaching and passing under overhead bridge structure

agents.ego_description: driving alongside the close billboard wall on the left, passing other vehicles while approaching an overpass

notable_agents.action: green sports car overtaking on the right

entered.detail: large wall-mounted advertisements featuring stylized faces and text passing by closely on the left
elevated highway overpass structure spanning across the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a section where the left side is dominated by a wall with large advertising billboards. The stadium recedes into the left background while the road passes under an approaching overpass structure, with vehicles passing by in adjacent lanes.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway under overpass with stadium receding in background

events.description: passing under overpass creates shadow and mixed lighting conditions
exiting the billboard wall section into more open highway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway under the overpass structure, with the stadium now visible in the left background

entered.detail: solid concrete barrier with yellow and black hazard stripes replacing the wire fence
pedestrian walkway or service bridge structure spanning the highway ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment passes under the overpass, creating mixed lighting with shadows across the road. The concrete barrier on the left features hazard stripes, while the mega-stadium recedes into the distance on the left. The highway continues forward with additional elevated structures visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along an elevated highway that curves around a massive futuristic stadium before passing under a heavy concrete overpass. It begins on a multi-lane road with the stadium visible in the distance, moving past a wire fence and guardrail as light traffic flows ahead. As the highway arcs to the right, the stadium expands to dominate the left side of the frame while a yellow industrial building with warning signage emerges on the right. The scene then shifts as the road straightens, passing a wall of large advertising billboards before the camera glides under the shadow of an approaching overpass. Finally, the lighting fluctuates between brightness and shadow beneath the structure, passing hazard-striped barriers as the stadium recedes into the distance and further elevated architecture appears ahead.
